nasb.text: Now it came about in the course of those many days that the king of Egypt died. And the sons of Israel sighed because of the bondage, and they cried out; and their cry for help because of their bondage rose up to God.

esv.text: During those many days the king of Egypt died, and the people of Israel groaned because of their slavery and cried out for help. Their cry for rescue from slavery came up to God.

cnv.text: 過了很久，埃及王死了。以色列人在捆鎖中歎息，他們就呼求，在捆鎖中的呼求達到　神那裡。

ccb.text: 过了多年，埃及王死了。以色列人受尽奴役，就哀叹呼求，声音传到上帝那里。
